title: Practice Questions for Exam #1 (not for credit)
description:
This set of questions are for practice in preparation for the exam. Keep in mind that the set is longer than you should expect for the actual midterm exam. Do not worry about the points values for each question. For these practice questions, you have unlimited time and an unlimited number of tries to go through them. You will be able to see the correct answers for all questions upon submission. 

I recommend the following:

  • Try to answer questions without first looking at the answers.
  • If you are stuck on a question, make a note of the topic and then go back to the chapter and lectures notes to learn it better.
